products.title: Micellar Cleansing Water
products.alt: Micellar Cleansing Water — gentle daily cleanser
products.description: A no-rinse micellar water that lifts makeup, sunscreen and grime without stripping or stinging. Everyday gentle cleanser.

expand.about: A pH-balanced micellar water built around micelle technology — tiny lipid particles that grab onto oil, makeup and SPF and lift them off without surfactants. No rinse, no tightness, no irritation. Safe for every skin type, including reactive and sensitive.
benefits: Removes makeup and SPF without rubbing
Safe for sensitive and reactive skin
facts: AM and PM as a first cleanse

products.title: Cleansing Foam
products.alt: Cleansing Foam — daily face wash for normal to oily skin
products.description: A creamy foaming cleanser that lifts the day off without leaving skin tight. Daily wash for normal-to-oily skin.

expand.about: A pH-balanced foaming cleanser that creates a soft, cushioning lather. Removes excess oil, sweat and SPF without disturbing the moisture barrier. The kind of basic that quietly upgrades a routine.
benefits: Removes oil and SPF without stripping

products.title: Blemish Purifying Face Wash
products.alt: Blemish Purifying Face Wash — for acne-prone skin
products.description: A targeted blemish wash that clears pore-clogging buildup and calms breakouts without over-drying.

expand.about: A daily face wash formulated for blemish-prone skin. Clears excess sebum and dead-skin buildup without stripping the barrier — so blemishes calm down rather than getting angrier. The first product to add when breakouts show up.
benefits: Won't over-dry or trigger rebound oil

products.title: Niacinamide Gel Moisturiser
products.alt: Niacinamide Gel Moisturiser — pore and tone treatment
products.description: A lightweight niacinamide gel that refines pores, evens tone and balances oil. The serum-meets-moisturiser hybrid your routine has been missing.

expand.about: A multi-tasking gel that delivers niacinamide (vitamin B3) at a clinically meaningful dose. Refines the look of pores, balances oil production, evens out tone and strengthens the moisture barrier — all in a featherweight finish that layers under SPF without pilling.

products.title: Vitamin C Serum
products.alt: Vitamin C Serum — brightening antioxidant
products.description: A potent vitamin C serum that fades dark spots, brightens dull skin and shields against daily damage.

expand.about: A stabilised vitamin C serum that delivers brightening, tone-correcting and antioxidant defence in one step. The hero product of any radiance routine — pairs with sunscreen for the gold-standard daytime stack.
benefits: Fades dark spots and uneven tone

products.title: Retinol Alternative Serum
products.alt: Retinol Alternative Serum — anti-aging without irritation
products.description: All the smoothing, refining benefits of retinol — without the redness, dryness or peeling. A gentler way into anti-aging.

expand.about: A plant-derived retinol alternative that delivers anti-aging benefits without the irritation curve of traditional retinol. Smooths fine lines, refines texture and supports cell turnover — kind enough to use every night, even on reactive skin.
benefits: Safe for sensitive and pregnancy-conscious users

products.title: Peptide Anti-Aging Serum
products.alt: Peptide Anti-Aging Serum — premium anti-aging treatment
products.description: Peptides plus supporting actives that target firmness, fine lines and the look of skin elasticity.

expand.about: A premium peptide serum that signals to skin to behave younger — supporting firmness, smoothness and elasticity without triggering sensitivity. Layers under any moisturiser, day or night.
benefits: Pairs with retinol for full anti-aging routine

products.title: Targeted Dark Spot Care 1% Kojic Acid
products.alt: Targeted Dark Spot Care — 1% kojic acid spot treatment
products.description: A targeted 1% kojic acid treatment for stubborn dark spots, post-blemish marks and uneven patches.

expand.about: A spot treatment formulated around 1% kojic acid — one of the most studied tone-correcting actives. Apply directly to dark spots, post-acne marks, sun damage or melasma to fade pigmentation over consistent use.
benefits: Fades stubborn dark spots over time

products.title: Moisturising Day Cream
products.alt: Moisturising Day Cream — daily hydrator
products.description: A daily moisturiser that hydrates, comforts and preps skin for SPF. The non-negotiable middle step.

expand.about: A clean, lightweight day cream that hydrates without weighing skin down or pilling under sunscreen. The daily essential — pleasant enough to use every morning, supportive enough that your skin notices when you skip it.
benefits: Daily hydration that doesn't weigh skin down

products.title: Blemish Care Moisturiser
products.alt: Blemish Care Moisturiser — daily moisturiser for acne-prone skin
products.description: A non-comedogenic moisturiser that hydrates blemish-prone skin without clogging pores or feeding breakouts.

expand.about: A daily moisturiser engineered for acne-prone skin. Hydrates, comforts and supports the moisture barrier — without the heavy butters, oils or fragrance that often trigger congestion. The moisturiser you can keep using during a breakout.

products.title: Retinol Alternative Moisturiser
products.alt: Retinol Alternative Moisturiser — anti-aging daily moisturiser
products.description: A daily moisturiser with retinol-alternative actives that smooth fine lines and refine texture without irritation.

expand.about: A daily moisturiser that bakes anti-aging benefits into the step you'd use anyway. Plant-derived retinol alternative smooths fine lines and refines texture, while ceramides and humectants keep the barrier comfortable.

products.title: Sensitive Skin Moisturiser
products.alt: Sensitive Skin Moisturiser — fragrance-free daily cream
products.description: A fragrance-free moisturiser built for reactive skin. Calms redness, hydrates deeply and rebuilds a stressed barrier.

expand.about: A pared-back daily moisturiser for skin that flares at the wrong things. Fragrance-free, essential-oil-free, and built around barrier-supporting humectants and lipids. Designed for skin that has been over-exfoliated, over-active'd, or just runs reactive by default.

products.title: Smoothing Eye Cream
products.alt: Smoothing Eye Cream — daily eye treatment
products.description: A featherweight eye cream that smooths the look of fine lines and brightens the under-eye area without migrating.

expand.about: A daily eye cream that targets the three main concerns of the under-eye area: fine lines, dehydration and dullness. Lightweight enough to layer under makeup, supportive enough that you'll keep reaching for it.
benefits: Smooths the look of fine lines
facts: All ages, fine lines, dark circles

products.title: Sunscreen SPF30
products.alt: Sunscreen SPF30 — daily broad-spectrum sun protection
products.description: A daily SPF30 you'll actually want to wear — no white cast, no sticky finish, no excuse not to use it.

expand.about: A broad-spectrum SPF30 that disappears on every skin tone, layers under makeup without pilling, and feels like a moisturiser instead of a chore. The single product with the biggest impact on long-term skin health.
benefits: No white cast on any skin tone

products.title: Brightening Face & Body Exfoliator with Kojic Acid
products.alt: Brightening Exfoliator with Kojic Acid — face and body
products.description: A dual face-and-body exfoliator with kojic acid that smooths texture and brightens uneven tone.

expand.about: A kojic-acid exfoliator that works on the face and body. Smooths bumpy texture, fades uneven tone, and unclogs pores — all without micro-tears. Use 2–3x weekly for visible smoothness.
benefits: Fades uneven tone with kojic acid

products.title: Acne Care Collection
products.alt: Acne Care Collection — full routine for blemish-prone skin
products.description: The complete routine for acne and blemish-prone skin. Save vs buying individually.

expand.about: A curated routine for skin that breaks out: targeted cleanser, pore-refining gel and a non-comedogenic moisturiser. Built so each product reinforces the next without overwhelming the barrier — the routine that actually clears blemishes instead of chasing them.
facts: Blemish Face Wash + Niacinamide Gel + Blemish Moisturiser
AM and PM as a complete routine

products.title: Anti-Aging Collection
products.alt: Anti-Aging Collection — complete routine for fine lines and firmness
products.description: A full anti-aging routine — peptides, retinol-alternative, eye cream and barrier support. Save vs buying individually.

expand.about: A complete anti-aging routine: a peptide serum and a retinol-alternative moisturiser layered with a smoothing eye cream. Targets fine lines, firmness and barrier health together — without forcing you to assemble the routine yourself.
benefits: Targets fine lines, firmness and elasticity
facts: Peptide Serum + Retinol Alt Moisturiser + Smoothing Eye Cream
AM and PM as a complete routine

products.title: Daily Radiance Collection
products.alt: Daily Radiance Collection — routine for dull, dehydrated skin
products.description: A radiance routine for dull, dehydrated skin. Vitamin C, day cream and SPF — the three-step glow stack.

expand.about: The three products that create visible glow: a vitamin C serum to brighten, a day cream to hydrate and smooth, and a daily SPF to protect everything you just built. The morning routine that makes the biggest visual difference.
facts: Vitamin C Serum + Moisturising Day Cream + Sunscreen SPF30
AM as a complete morning routine

products.title: Clear Complexion Collection
products.alt: Clear Complexion Collection — gentle routine for combination and sensitive skin
products.description: A balanced routine for combination and sensitive skin. Gentle micellar cleanser, niacinamide and a calming moisturiser.

expand.about: A balancing routine for combination skin and skin that runs reactive. Gentle micellar cleanser, niacinamide gel to refine and balance, and a sensitive-skin moisturiser to keep the barrier comfortable. No fragrance, no overload.
facts: Micellar Water + Niacinamide Gel + Sensitive Moisturiser
AM and PM as a complete routine

products.title: Dark Spot Routine Duo
products.alt: Dark Spot Routine Duo — focused routine for hyperpigmentation
products.description: A two-product duo to fade hyperpigmentation: vitamin C in the AM, kojic acid spot treatment at night.

expand.about: A focused duo for hyperpigmentation, post-acne marks and sun damage. Vitamin C brightens and shields in the morning; kojic acid targets stubborn spots at night. The minimum effective routine for visible tone correction.
benefits: Targets dark spots from two angles
facts: Vitamin C Serum + Targeted Dark Spot Care
